title: Language Change - Earbuds/Headsets are out of date and smart Charge Chase/Stand is up to date
scenario: Language change in Device Settings does not persist on smart charge case when earbuds are on outdated firmware and case is already up to date
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) to open Device Settings.
Navigate to Device Settings → Language and change the language (e.g., from English to French).
Ensure the earbuds/headset are on outdated firmware (older version).
Ensure the smart charge case/stand is already up to date (latest firmware).
Initiate a firmware update (DFU) from Device Settings → Firmware Update.
Wait for the firmware update process to complete for all components (earbuds/headset and case/stand).
After the update completes, check the language setting on the smart charge case (e.g., Voyager Free 60+).
expected: The firmware update (DFU) completes successfully for all components (earbuds/headset and smart charge case/stand). The language change applied to the smart charge case (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) is retained and correctly reflected after the update.
